content:
Aman Kumar
Computer Science Undergraduate
Dhanbad, Jharkhand·    +91-7462015068·    ranjannikhi334@gmail.com·    GitHub·    LinkedIn·    Portfolio
Professional Summary
Computer Science undergraduate focused on full-stack development, blockchain, and GenAI systems, building scalable
backend architectures and real-time applications.
Experience
Software Engineering Intern, CliniceaMar 2026 – Present
•  Integrated ABDM (HPR/HFR) and eTIMS APIs to enable healthcare interoperability and compliant billing workflows.
•  Developed backend systems for practitioner onboarding, OTP/email verification, and facility linking.
•  Conducted API testing and validation using Postman and Swagger for real-time healthcare integrations.
•  Built invoice processing logic aligned with compliance and regulatory requirements.
Projects
Medosphere — Healthcare Management SystemGitHub
React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Redis, WebRTC, RAG, Pinecone
•  Built a healthcare platform supporting OPD booking, digital medical records, and real-time queue management.
•  Developed a GenAI assistant using RAG with Pinecone for context-aware symptom analysis.
•  Modeled patient–doctor relationships using Neo4j for structured medical history and efficient data traversal.
•  Implemented WebRTC-based video consultations with integrated digital prescription workflows.
Nyxel — Competitive Programming PlatformGitHub  —  Live
Next.js, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, JUDGE0, Cloudinary
•  Built a competitive programming platform with curated DSA problems and structured submission tracking.
•  Integrated JUDGE0 API for secure multi-language code execution (C++, Java, Python, JavaScript).
•  Designed REST APIs with optimized PostgreSQL queries for efficient and scalable data retrieval.
CardiaC — Discord-Inspired Communication PlatformGitHub  —  Live
Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Socket.io, LiveKit, Clerk
•  Built a Discord-inspired communication platform with server and channel-based architecture.
•  Implemented real-time messaging using Socket.io and integrated LiveKit for voice and video communication.
•  Developed role-based authentication and access control using Clerk.
Technical Skills
• Languages:  JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, C++, C, C#, Solidity
• Frontend:  React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
• Backend:  Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, JWT Authentication, Prisma ORM
• Databases:  PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Neo4j (Graph DB)
• AI & Real-Time:  LangChain, RAG Architecture, Pinecone, Socket.io, WebRTC, LiveKit, Kafka
• Tools & Cloud:  Git, Docker, Postman, Vercel, Render, AWS (EC2, S3)
Education
Birsa Institute of Technology, SindriSept 2024 – May 2028
Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and EngineeringCGPA: 8.0/10.0
Achievements and Activities
• Reliance Foundation Scholar — Selected for a national scholarship recognizing academic merit and leadership.
• AIHealthTech Hackathon — Runner-Up; built an AI-driven healthcare solution for real-world use cases.
• Finalist, AMTZ Hackathon (Vizag) — Led a project in a 4-day hackathon at Andhra Pradesh MedTech Zone
(AMTZ), one of the world’s largest healthcare clusters.
• Startup Pitch Event (IIM Calcutta & JEA) — Finalist; presented a startup idea to industry evaluators.
• Member, CSE Society, BIT Sindri — Contributed to technical initiatives.
